meta.author: imjlk
meta.title: K Typewriter GitHub Preview
meta.description: Install K Typewriter directly from the GitHub repository and open a published demo page in WordPress Playground.

steps.code:
K Typewriter GitHub Preview

This Playground instance installs the plugin from GitHub and keeps a static first-message fallback before animation begins.

HTML; $page_id = wp_insert_post( wp_slash( array( 'ID' => $existing_page instanceof WP_Post ? $existing_page->ID : 0, 'post_name' => $demo_slug, 'post_title' => 'K Typewriter GitHub Preview', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_content' => $content ) ), true ); if ( is_wp_error( $page_id ) ) { throw new Exception( $page_id->get_error_message() ); } update_option( 'blogname', 'K Typewriter GitHub Preview' ); update_option( 'blogdescription', 'Preview the K Typewriter block directly from the GitHub repository.' ); update_option( 'show_on_front', 'page' ); update_option( 'page_on_front', (int) $page_id ); ?>
